ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "the_geom" TEXT /* Geographic location of the incident */,
  "date_" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "time_" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the incident occurred */,
  "nearest_pl" TEXT /* Nearest place to the incident */,
  "hazard_typ" TEXT /* Type of hazard (e.g., landslide, flood) */,
  "landslide_" TEXT /* Type of landslide (e.g., mudslide, rockslide) */,
  "trigger" TEXT /* Trigger for the incident (e.g., rain, earthquake) */,
  "storm_name" TEXT /* Name of the storm associated with the incident */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities resulting from the incident */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries resulting from the incident */,
  "source_nam" TEXT /* Name of the source providing the incident data */,
  "source_lin" TEXT /* URL of the source providing the incident data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the incident data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the incident record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the incident record was last updated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  "estimated_damage" REAL /* Estimated financial damage caused by the incident */,
  "affected_population" INTEGER /* Number of people affected by the incident */,
  "evacuation_orders" TEXT /* Information about any evacuation orders issued */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Current status of recovery efforts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_hazard_typ FOREIGN KEY ("hazard_typ") REFERENCES hazards ("hazard_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_landslide_ FOREIGN KEY ("landslide_") REFERENCES landslide_types ("landslide_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_trigger FOREIGN KEY ("trigger") REFERENCES triggers ("trigger_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_source_nam FOREIGN KEY ("source_nam") REFERENCES sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code for the country (e.g., US, ID) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazards" (
  "hazard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazard type */,
  "hazard_name" TEXT /* Name of the hazard type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hazard type */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the hazard type */,
  "common_triggers" TEXT /* Common triggers for the hazard type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hazard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landslide_types" (
  "landslide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landslide type */,
  "landslide_name" TEXT /* Name of the landslide type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the landslide type */,
  "common_triggers" TEXT /* Common triggers for the landslide type */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material involved in the landslide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landslide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "triggers" (
  "trigger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trigger type */,
  "trigger_name" TEXT /* Name of the trigger type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trigger type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the trigger */,
  "common_hazards" TEXT /* Common hazards associated with the trigger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trigger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "reliability_score" TEXT /* Reliability score of the source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the location is situated */,
  "adminname1" TEXT /* Administrative name 1 (e.g., state, province) */,
  "adminname2" TEXT /* Administrative name 2 (e.g., city, town) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the photo is associated with */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the photo */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the photo */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the photo was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_photos_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_photos_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source the incident is associated with */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* Reliability score of the source for this specific incident */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the source has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id", "incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the incident is associated with */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the incident to the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id", "incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the incident */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
